ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_symbols" (
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock symbol */,
  "symbol_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock symbol */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the symbol is listed */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector or industry the symbol belongs to */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the symbol belongs to */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the symbol is listed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock symbol the data point belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data point */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock on the given date */,
  "adjusted_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "dividend" REAL /* Dividend paid on the given date */,
  "split_coefficient" REAL /* Split coefficient for the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES stock_symbols ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technical_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technical indicator */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock symbol the indicator belongs to */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the technical indicator (e.g., moving average, standard deviation) */,
  "indicator_value" REAL /* Value of the technical indicator */,
  "indicator_date" TEXT /* Date of the technical indicator */,
  "indicator_type" TEXT /* Type of the technical indicator (e.g., momentum, trend, volatility) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technical_indicators_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES stock_symbols ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock symbol the forecast belongs to */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date of the forecast */,
  "predicted_price" REAL /* Predicted price of the stock on the given date */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the forecast */,
  "forecast_type" TEXT /* Type of forecast (e.g., point, range, probability) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES stock_symbols ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, portfolio manager, risk manager) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock symbol the alert belongs to */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., price, volume, indicator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "x_values" (
  "x_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each X-value */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock symbol the X-value belongs to */,
  "x_name" TEXT /* Name of the X-value (e.g., X-11, X-10, ...) */,
  "x_value" REAL /* Value of the X-value */,
  "x_date" TEXT /* Date of the X-value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("x_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_x_values_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES stock_symbols ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "y_values" (
  "y_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Y-value */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock symbol the Y-value belongs to */,
  "y_name" TEXT /* Name of the Y-value (e.g., Y1, Y2, ...) */,
  "y_value" REAL /* Value of the Y-value */,
  "y_date" TEXT /* Date of the Y-value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("y_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_y_values_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES stock_symbols ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "class_labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class label */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock symbol the label belongs to */,
  "label_name" TEXT /* Name of the class label (e.g., Class (2%)) */,
  "label_value" INTEGER /* Value of the class label */,
  "label_date" TEXT /* Date of the class label */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_class_labels_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES stock_symbols ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "real_class_labels" (
  "real_label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each real class label */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock symbol the real label belongs to */,
  "real_label_name" TEXT /* Name of the real class label (e.g., RealClass (2%)) */,
  "real_label_value" INTEGER /* Value of the real class label */,
  "real_label_date" TEXT /* Date of the real class label */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("real_label_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_real_class_labels_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES stock_symbols ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date the activity was performed */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, logout, data access) */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "setting_description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of the notification (e.g., alert, report, update) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock symbol the article belongs to */,
  "article_date" TEXT /* Date of the article */,
  "article_title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "article_text" TEXT /* Text of the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES stock_symbols ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media_posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock symbol the post belongs to */,
  "post_date" TEXT /* Date of the post */,
  "post_text" TEXT /* Text of the post */,
  "post_sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the post (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_posts_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES stock_symbols ("symbol_id")
)
